# ZEN Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: zen-hollywood-1825-n-las-palmas-ave
- Address: 1825 N Las Palmas Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90028
- Primary URL: https://www.zenhollywoodapts.com/
- Management company: Vista Associates, Inc.
- Recommended status: rejected
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 1 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Management: 2 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: high
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: high
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site continues to market concierge service, business center, smart-home features, and valet parking. Source: ZEN Hollywood official site (https://www.zenhollywoodapts.com/). Note: Official copy calls out 24-hour concierge service, business center, and valet parking.
- [review] Apartments.com currently lists package service, concierge, conference rooms, EV charging, and key-fob entry. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/zen-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/wr9hjth/). Note: Current listing includes package service, concierge, conference rooms, EV charging, and key-fob entry.
- [review] A separate public travel/review page surfaced favorable commentary about security and maintenance, creating a direct conflict with the repo’s older security concern. Source: Wanderlog aggregation (https://wanderlog.com/place/details/4172114/zen-hollywood). Note: The page describes management and security personnel as exceptional, which conflicts with the repo’s prior reject note.

## Open questions
- Confirm whether any rooftop work or lounge area exists and clarify current valet versus self-parking operations.

## Notes
Rejected because the repo’s quiet and security objections remain decisive for this search. Current public listings still show a rich amenity package, but they do not resolve the earlier balcony break-in pattern and structural sound-transfer concern.
